summary: Your Pay Now buttons are now active. Ezra has a remaining Winter Macaronis balance ($275.00) and Spring Macaronis balance ($450.00) — $725.00 total.
How to pay: sign in at accounts.americanseekersacademy.com → Payments → Upcoming Payments → click Pay Now on each row and complete checkout with your card.
Approved account credits ($570.00 total) will apply automatically at checkout and may reduce the card charge.
Spring session ends June 12. Please pay at your earliest convenience.
Reply to this email if Pay Now does not appear or you need help.
